paradox.apply_batch_settings_hint: Confirm the depth, time and channel selections and return to the batch converter without opening a document.
paradox.batch_ambiguous: The index is ambiguous. Open this DB with File → Import → GeoScape / Paradox DB, choose depth/time manually, save a profile, then select it in the batch converter.
paradox.batch_cancelled: Batch conversion was cancelled by the user.
paradox.batch_configuration_summary: Operations requiring manual configuration: {count}. Select a row and click “Configure selected DB…”.
paradox.batch_depth_help: Creates a LAS whose primary index is depth.
paradox.batch_done_summary: LAS created: {created}; with warnings: {warnings}; errors: {errors}; skipped: {skipped}.
paradox.batch_duplicate_targets: Several operations resolve to the same file “{target}” ({first} and {second}). Keep the {{source_name}}_{{mode}}.las mask or use unique names.
paradox.batch_exists: The result already exists. Change the mask or folder, or enable overwrite.
paradox.batch_instructions: The LAS file is saved automatically. 1) Add DB files. 2) Choose the output folder. 3) For normal depth data, keep “Depth LAS”. 4) Keep the recommended name mask. 5) Click “Convert and save LAS”. After completion, select a row and open the LAS in the editor or open the result folder.
paradox.batch_no_depth: No reliable depth channel was found.
paradox.batch_no_time: No reliable time channel was found.
paradox.batch_profile_mismatch: {file}: profile was not applied because the schema signature differs.
paradox.batch_profile_no_depth: The profile does not contain a depth channel.
paradox.batch_profile_no_time: The profile does not contain a time channel.
paradox.batch_progress_help: Processing “{file}”: operation {current} of {total}. The operation can be stopped safely with the Stop button.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_curve_values: Values of channel {mnemonic} changed after reopening.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_curves: The channel set changed after reopening: {details}.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_header: Header {name} does not match the actual grid: expected {expected}, got {actual}.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_index: Index-column values differ from the source after reopening.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_rows: The row count changed after reopening: expected {expected}, got {actual}.
paradox.batch_roundtrip_success: LAS was created, fully verified, and preserves the actual STEP={step}.
paradox.batch_starting: Starting {count} operations. Source DB files are opened read-only.
paradox.batch_time_help: Creates a LAS whose primary index is time. Enable only when a time channel exists.
paradox.cancel_hint: Stop reading safely or close the window after analysis completes.
paradox.cancel_safe_hint: The window will close after the current read block finishes so application state remains consistent.

paradox.configuration_not_applied: The index configuration was not applied.
paradox.configure_selected_source_hint: Open depth, time and channel selection for an ambiguous table.
paradox.confirm_cancel_close: Conversion is still running. Stop it and close the window?
paradox.create_hint: Creating a normal editor document without modifying the source Paradox table.
paradox.depth_grid_help: As source preserves the actual step. GeoScape 0.2 m sorts depth, keeps the last row at each duplicate depth, and linearly interpolates numeric channels without bridging NULL gaps.
paradox.drop_empty_channels: Do not import completely empty channels
paradox.failed_hint: Correct the selected index or file format and try again. The source file was not modified.

paradox.invalid_worker_result: The worker returned an invalid result.

tablet.curve_pencil_undo_tooltip: Undo the last applied curve edit (Ctrl+Z).
tablet.curve_pencil_unsaved: ✎ {mnemonic}: changes applied and dependent curves recalculated. Not saved — press the diskette button.
tablet.depth_navigation_hint: Wheel: scroll depth; Ctrl+wheel: zoom; drag: pan
tablet.depth_span_tooltip: Choose how many units of the current vertical axis are visible on screen: 1, 5, 10–100, or enter a custom value.
tablet.empty: Open a LAS file to build the tablet
tablet.empty_add_track: Add a track to the tablet
tablet.form_edit_off: View mode. Press F4 to change the form or safely edit annotations.
tablet.form_edit_on: F4 mode is enabled. A normal click selects a column; double-clicking a graphical column opens its editor. To add a callout, comment or image, choose a tool and click the required graph position.
tablet.lba_empty: No LBA data. Add LBA observations to a cuttings sample interval.
tablet.lba_header: LBA: LB · LOB · MOB · HOB · VHO\nIntensity: 1–5 points
tablet.select_track: Select a track in the log display first
tablet.select_track_first: Select a column or track on the tablet first.

time_to_depth.created_log: TIME → DEPTH: created {rows} rows; empty bins: {empty}.
time_to_depth.description: Creates a new depth dataset from a time recording that contains a separate depth channel. The source dataset is left unchanged.
time_to_depth.interpolation_warning: Interpolation is used only when Linear interpolation is explicitly selected. Other methods do not fill empty bins automatically.
time_to_depth.requires_indexes: The dataset must contain both time and depth indexes.
time_to_depth.title: TIME → DEPTH conversion

transfer.no_source: The project has no other source dataset
transfer.title: Curve insertion
ui.form_edit_disabled: Form editing is disabled. The tablet is in view and navigation mode.
ui.form_edit_enabled: F4 mode is enabled: click a column to select it, double-click for full editing; for annotations choose a tool on the compact bar and click the graph position.

ui.help.edit_track: Edit the selected column, parameters, captions, scales and appearance.
ui.help.form_manager: Open the factory and user form library grouped by depth and time.
ui.help.import_data: Import LAS, CSV or Excel through the universal importer.
ui.help.las_editor: Create, repair, merge and safely save new LAS copies.
ui.help.open_project: Open a previously saved GEOLOG project.
ui.help.remove_track: Remove the selected column from the current form after confirmation.
ui.help.save_project: Save the current project, wells and entered data.
ui.help.save_user_form: Save current columns, captions, scales, grids and styles as a user form.
ui.help.tablet_edit_mode: F4 enables form tools and the professional annotation layer: callouts, comments, images and graph context actions.
